subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: The capacity of a portable grease interceptor must be authorised by the Permit Authority.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A portable grease interceptor must contain a permanently fixed, ridged baffle constructed of a minimum—

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A portable grease interceptor must be provided with airtight covers using lever clips.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Ventilation of portable grease interceptors must—

ol.li: be extended to open air; and

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A portable grease interceptor must be located in a position that enables ready access for maintenance and inspection.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A portable grease interceptor must be protected from direct sunlight.

callout.p: Where the Permit Authority has not specified the capacity of a grease interceptor in accordance with C4D13(1), it must be—

ol.li: equivalent to the maximum hourly discharge; and
no less than 100 litres below the outlet.

callout.p: See TAS Figure C4D13 for a typical portable grease interceptor appliance.
